name: Tarragon Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a wide mouth quart jar three-quarters full with tarragon sprigs.
2. Heat the white wine vinegar to a boil and pour it into the jar.
3. Cover tightly and store in a cool, shaded place for 10 days to 2 weeks.
4. Strain the mixture into bottles.
5. Add 1 to 2 fresh tarragon sprigs to each bottle for decoration.
6. Tighten the lids securely.
